Company Profile:
Tavares LLC, established in 2007, is a Rhode Island-based, 8(a)-certified general
contractor, providing reliable and quality general construction services. As a result of
working with major corporations, Tavares LLC has gained an in depth knowledge and
breadth of experience of construction management for federal, state and local
procurements.
Since its inception, Tavares LLC has successfully completed over 200 projects in our ten
year history and every job was performed on time and within budget. Tavares LLC’s
job safety record is tremendous and our EMR is .69; which is among the best in the
industry.
Tavares LLC is capable of self-performing carpentry, painting, drywall, dust/noise
protection, demolition, and project supervision.
CONTRACT Info:
DUNS: 006493690
CAGE CODE: 6PY01

Prime Contract
Department of Interior, National Parks Service
Boott Cotton Mills, Lowell, MA - Historic Windows
Total Value: $2,942,548
Replaced approximately 335 deteriorated existing wood window with new
custom aluminum windows and repaired approximately 27 existing wood
windows that were all installed in 1980. These windows were not similar
to the original 1871 windows. Replacement windows typical of late 19th
century textile mills more closely matched the operation, configuration,
and historical appearance of original windows
Subcontract
South Street Landing Enabling, Providence, RI
Demolition and Asbestos Abatement
Prime Contractor: Gilbane Building Company
Total Value: $5,333,602
Paint removal on existing steel, miscellaneous metals, and brick/CMU;
lead paint abatement and general demolition of concrete, wood, CMU,
structural and non-structural steel and steel decking from two houses,
turbine hall and dynamo hall; asbestos caulking removal from
east/south/west elevations
Subcontract
Lowell Justice Center (DCAMM), Lowell, MA
Doors/Frames/Hardware Furnish & Installation
Prime Contractor: Dimeo Construction Company
Total Value: $1,921,928
Furnished and installed all interior/exterior hollow metal doors and
interior/exterior hollow metal frames for doors, transoms, sidelights,
borrow lights; flush wood doors, interior sound control door assemblies
and mechanical and electrical finish hardware.
Subcontract
CambridgeSide Galleria Mall, Cambridge, MA
Drywall and Demolition
Prime Contractor: The Whiting-Turner Contracting Co.
Total Value: $3,245,653
Complete renovations of common areas-approx. 200,000 s.f. including
new soffits at railings with built-in LED lighting, new drywall ceilings,
removal of old column covers and wall finishes for new tile and covers.
Provided daily cleanup and debris removal after other trades.
Subcontract
Rhode Island Veterans Home, Bristol, RI
Windows
Prime Contractor: East Coast Interiors
Total Value: $2,113,133
Supplied and installed windows with screens, unloaded and stocked all
windows, flashing window openings, installed pre-made window pans,
caulked windows, installed windows, flash over window flange
Subcontract
Citizens Bank Refresh Project, Various NE Locations
General Trades
Prime Contractor: Gilbane Building Company
Total Value: $1,522,004
Provided union carpentry, labor, and materials to renovate existing
branches throughout New England. Work consisted of demolition, new
walls, painting, ceilings, millwork, flooring electrical and HVAC. All locations
remained open while the work was performed at nights and weekends.
Subcontract
Walgreen’s, Providence, RI
General Trades
Prime Contractor: Gilbane Building Company
Total Value: $1,327,000
Complete ground up construction including all site work, concrete,
masonry, metals, rough and finish carpentry, roofing system, doors and
hardware, glazing, drywall, acoustical ceilings, painting and wallcoverings,
flooring, miscellaneous specialties, plumbing, mechanical, and electrical.
Subcontract
Orient Heights Phase 1, East Boston, MA
Interior Glazing, Painting, and Specialties
Prime Contractor: Suffolk Construction Company
Total Value: $929,118
Furnished and installed aluminum-framed entrances and store fronts,
glazing, caulking within system, painting, furnished only toilet accessories,
furnished only fire extinguishers and cabinets, furnished and installed
postal specialties-Midrise building interior only, furnished and installed
window blinds, furnished and installed interior bike racks.
Subcontract
College of the Holy Cross, Worcester, MA
Doors, Frames, Hardware and Painting
Prime Contractor: Bond Brothers
Total Value: $1,800,312
Furnished, fabricated, delivered, and installed all doors, frames and
hardware in the Hart Center Building. Primed, painted, touched up all walls
and ceilings, painted FP pipe-crew tank, diffusers, temporary protection
walls, equipment duct and conduit in Fieldhouse.
Subcontract
Northeastern University MRI @ ISEC, Boston, MA
Drywall
Prime Contractor: Skanska USA Building Inc.
Total Value: $177,000
5,000 s.f. MRI Room and Support Areas; includes carpentry and labor
support to install backup support for MRI Anti-Magnetic panels and
equipment. Also built all interior walls and ceilings. Provided daily
cleaning and support for project.
Prime Contract
WorldWide Flight Services
General Trades/Building Fit-out
Total Value: $677,000
Interior renovations of 50,000 s.f. cargo facility; includes new cold storage
unit, office finishes, x-ray equipment, impact protection, security camera
system, exterior light and life safety upgrades.
Subcontract
275 Albany Street, Boston, MA
Painting
Prime Contractor: Suffolk Construction Company
Total Value: $2,311,020
Painted Midrise Building Floors 1-10; Common Areas-Stair Towers 1-6,
Midrise Hallways Floors 1-10, Tower Hallways Floors 1-19; Painted Tower
Building Floors 1-19
Subcontract
Longmeadow High School, Longmeadow, MA
Asbestos Abatement and Demolition
Prime Contractor: Gilbane Building Company
Total Value: $2,610,500
Asbestos Abatement of 31 Pipe Tunnels-pipe and fitting insulation 8500 lf,
brick removal at Building “A”, Demolition of Stairwell and Concrete
Disposal, 1971 Building Floor Tile and Mastic Abatement, Separation of
Building to remain into three (3) areas from the building to be demolished;
Demolition of existing high school building, slab, and foundation
Prime Contract
NAVFAC, Newport Naval Base, Newport, RI
Scaffold/Staging at Building 1275
Total Value: $34,500
Removed panels and reinstalled next day to allow access for coring at
each location; Provided labor support, movable staging and additional
cleanup services for the coring of (19) locations; Erected (2) individual
staging platforms for removal of the panels; Demolition of ceiling finish
and installed new mesh with fire resistant coding; Repaired metal panel
clips; Reinstalled metal panels.
Prime Contract
Department of Interior, National Parks Service
Easton Building, Boston, MA - Rehabilitation of Floors 1 & 2
Total Value: $1,191,500
Removal of 2500 sf asbestos containing floor tiles and mastic; furnished and
installed glass/glazing, Inclined Wheelchair Platform Lift for barrier free
access, plumbing, fire protection, HVAC, Lighting Fixtures and Wiring,
Lighting Control Devices and Wiring, Power Devices and Wiring., Fire
Alarm Devices and Wiring, Tel/Data back boxes and stub-ups, and Plastic
Laminate Clad Architectural Cabinets, Hardware and Accessories
